snapshot.content: Cycle 258: Completed the forkable template goal — all 6 tasks done. Final task was end-to-end validation of the fork flow: tested file existence, template substitution (full + minimal), schema SQL structure, seed-data consistency, fork-init coverage, cycle-start branch argument, and CLAUDE.md.minimal sections. Created test-fork-flow.sh with 50 automated checks, all passing. Also fixed fork-init.sh to clean artifacts/migrations/ and artifacts/site/. Three active goals remain blocked on credentials. Two pending goals await decomposition.
snapshot.current_focus: Decompose the GitHub Action goal (priority 7, pending) or the decision simulator goal (priority 8, pending) into concrete tasks.
